race.comment: ZOU BIG BOY (1) was seven weeks between runs when he faded in the heavy (10) going to finish a poor last with the 62kg over 1605m at Coffs Harbour. Fitter now and assess on the earlier runs on the firmer tracks. EN PRIMEUR (14) returned solid closing splits from back in the field with an encouraging fourth over 1600m at Quirindi in stronger company. Maps well today and can return to winning form. RETHINK IT (6) jumps in trip and worth noting she's undefeated in two starts at this track. Sat on the good speed in the heavy going with a fighting second over 1205m at Coffs Harbour. Best figures measure up and gets every chance. MEDDLESOME (13) only the one win from sixteen starts and unlucky not to have a few more wins on the CV. Finished runner-up at her last two starts and gets every chance today.
